welcome.title: Welcome to Bluefin
welcome.description: A cloud-native developer workstation built on Fedora Atomic Desktop technology.

features.title: Developer-First
features.description: Pre-configured with Brew, Devbox, Devcontainers, and cloud-native tools out of the box.

community.title: Documentation & Community
community.description: Find docs at docs.projectbluefin.io and join the community on Discord.

developer.title: Always Up-to-Date
developer.description: Automatic updates via bootc. Your system stays current with the latest features and fixes.

completed.title: Welcome to Bluefin
completed.description: Reboot into your new Bluefin system. Welcome aboard!
